The > major liability being a commercial loan balance of approximately > $34,884.30. Additionally, there is an average of $35,000.00 accounts > receivables at the end of each month plus cash on hand. There are no > liens or outstanding judgements against Hairoun Aviation.

body_html:
Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: wllerc@aol.com
Date: May 8, 2008 6:37:26 PM EDT
To: LVJET@aol.com
Cc: DKIESQ@aol.com, rkahn@nysgmail.com
Subject: Re: FBO offer

Hello Mr. Visoski:
   Thanks for your interest in buying Hairoun Aviation dba/Execujet. To respond briefly to your offer, I want to let you know that I'll accept $390,000.00 for all of company's assets and liabilities. The major liability being a commercial loan balance of approximately $34,884.30. Additionally, there is an average of $35,000.00 accounts receivables at the end of each month plus cash on hand. There are no liens or outstanding judgements against Hairoun Aviation.
   Full details of all company assets, liquid and real will be provided later. Thanks for your kind consideration and looking foward to successful business transaction.

Best regards,

D. Eric Williams
Gen. Manger
Execujet Flight Servcies
340-715-3821(ph)
340-779-13409fax)
340-513-7812(cell)




-----Original Message-----
From: LVJET@aol.com
To: WllErc@aol.com
Cc: DKIESQ@aol.com; rkahn@nysgmail.com
Sent: Wed, 7 May 2008 4:03 pm
Subject: FBO offer

Mr. Eric Williams,
It was a pleasure meeting Mrs. William today and touring your facility.
On behalf of Mr. Epstein and Little St. James, we would like to offer $325,000.00 for ExecuJet Flight Service.
This offer is contingent of our satisfactory audit of books / records and liens that may be held against business.
I look forward to continued operation of your business and support of your clientele.
 
 
I will leave this offer open to your response till Noon on Friday, May 9th, 2008.
 
 
Sincerely,
Larry Visoski, Chief Pilot,
JeGe Inc / Hyperion Air Inc.
917-868-6145 cell
lvjet@aol.com
